source_note: Base principale: CfxNatives vehicle atlas snapshot listing 692 GTA V / FiveM vehicle spawn model names in 19 categories. Extra entries: model names observed in current Cfx.re docs snippets but not present in the 692 snapshot; some may require newer game builds.
parser_tip: Pour comparer un texte radio/OCR, normalise en minuscules sans accents et enlève espaces/tirets, puis compare avec normalized_aliases.
